posts.title: I am scared for my Laif!
posts.summary: Experimenting with a OpenClaw-based agentic system to properly coach me in sports and in general l(a)if (haha) sh leif.
posts.content:
I've been my own coach for a while. Needed to distrubute the load of hacing to deal with me and my training and school. Now, Laif knows me almost as good as I know myself, and I find it scary, fun and helpful.

The name is a play on 'life', 'ai'(it's here to stay) and 'leif olav alnes'. ### How it works

Built on OpenClaw, which is a open-sourced framwork for personal agentic AI I've been tinkering with. It's based around skills and tools for the agent to call — strava for training data, plugga for study and exam load, weather, calendar, and so on. 
The gbrains part is a memory setup, which with some tweaking worked better for my use case. Standard RAG so he can recall my sessions, exams and life stuff n
### Does it work

Sorta as they say in the states. It's very expensive, so I am using some of the left over tokens from Dalai. It was too complex for sonnet 4.6, so I pivoted to opus for better (and more expensive) quality. It is not scarily good, but as they say on linkedin: this is the worst they will ever be.

It is cool and a steep learning curve, and I just hope not to go bankrupt due to hundreds of cron jobs and heartbeats each using millions of tokens. Take care.

posts.title: Hi Claude, please make it say "Hello, world"
posts.summary: First post on wwwik.no. Will probably forget to write any more.
posts.content:
This is the first post @ **wwwik.no**.

I built this as a home for my CV, projects, and occasional writing.  I want to take record of things I've worked on and i had a great idea for a domain name.

### What to expect

Mix of:
- Contrary to popular belief: **NO AI SLOP** (it's true) 
- Notes on things I'm building
- Accomplishments in a braggy way 
- Accomplishments in a humble way 
- Thoughts that I write procrastination essays about

Feel free to contact me if you read anything on here.
